---
title: "Our Services"
description: "Comprehensive technology services: digital infrastructure, NIS2 compliance, cybersecurity, cloud, and digital resilience for modern organizations."
page-layout: full
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ap { --c: #81BD4A; --g: #86868b; font-family: 'Open Sans', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; }
        .ap-hero { padding: 12rem 0 8rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-hero h1 { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.045em; line-height: 1.06; }
        .ap-hero .gr { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 500px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; }
        .ap-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ap-bg { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-bg { background: #161617; }
        .ap h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .ap .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto 5rem; }
        .ap-t { text-align: center; padding: 0 0.75rem; }
        .ap-t i { font-size: 1.75rem; color: var(--c); display: block; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.85; }
        .ap-t h3 { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.35rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
        .ap-t p { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-lk { color: var(--c); font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-lk:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-lk::after { content: " \203A"; font-weight: 300; }
        .ap-r { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6rem; }
        .ap-r.rv { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .ap-ri { flex: 0 0 50%; }
        .ap-ri img { width: 100%; border-radius: 28px; }
        .ap-rt h2 { text-align: left; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-rt p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--g); line-height: 1.65; }
        .ap-rt .lk { margin-top: 1.75rem; }
        .ap-n { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .ap-nn { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; color: var(--c); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }
        .ap-nl { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--g); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-top: 0.35rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--g); max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-b { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--c); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; }
        .ap-b:hover { background: #6BA33A; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-sm { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--g); margin-top: 1.75rem; }
        .ap-sm i { color: var(--c); }
        .ap-d { width: 36px; height: 3px; background: var(--c); margin: 0 auto 3.5rem; border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0.6; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ap-hero { padding: 7rem 0 5rem; }
          .ap-r, .ap-r.rv { flex-direction: column; gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-ri { flex: none; }
          .ap-rt h2 { text-align: center; }
          .ap-n { gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-cta { padding: 6rem 0; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ap">

<div class="ap-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Our <span class="gr">Services</span></h1>
    <p>Comprehensive technology solutions for organizations that value security, transparency, and open-source.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Everything you need</h2>
    <p class="sub">Five practices working together to keep your business running and secure.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>Open-source UNIX and Apple platforms built for modern businesses.</p><a href="/digital/" class="ap-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Security</h3><p>24/7 SOC monitoring, threat hunting, and incident response.</p><a href="/security/" class="ap-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Gap analysis and compliance roadmaps for the EU directive.</p><a href="/services/nis2/" class="ap-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud</h3><p>Migration, DevOps, and multi-cloud infrastructure.</p><a href="/services/cloud/" class="ap-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg"><div class="ap-t"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i><h3>Digital Resilience</h3><p>Business continuity and disaster recovery frameworks.</p><a href="/services/digital-resilience/" class="ap-lk">Learn more</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-r">
      <div class="ap-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Code on screen"></div>
      <div class="ap-rt">
        <h2>Built on open-source.<br>Secured by default.</h2>
        <p>Every tool we deploy can be audited. Every system is hardened from day one. We use battle-tested open-source software so you get full transparency without sacrificing security.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/security/" class="ap-lk">See our security approach</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-r rv">
      <div class="ap-ri"><img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="Team meeting"></div>
      <div class="ap-rt">
        <h2>From discovery to<br>continuous support.</h2>
        <p>We start by understanding your requirements, then plan, build, test, and deploy. After launch, we provide ongoing monitoring and maintenance — so nothing falls through the cracks.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-lk">Talk to our team</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-n">
      <div><div class="ap-nn">15+</div><div class="ap-nl">Years experience</div></div>
      <div><div class="ap-nn">100%</div><div class="ap-nl">Open-source stack</div></div>
      <div><div class="ap-nn">EU</div><div class="ap-nl">Data residency</div></div>
      <div><div class="ap-nn">24/7</div><div class="ap-nl">Monitoring</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ap-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to get started?</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at what you need.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-b">Book a free consultation</a>
    <div class="ap-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 min &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No commitment
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
